# 📄 Privacy is Value — Equation Explainer (MyTerms)
**document** · shared · knowledge

Compact explainer of V(π,t) for MyTerms alliance audience. P^1.5 holographic bound, C credential verifiability, Q separation quality (three-axis Φ), S surveillance resistance, A_h(τ) holonic memory, ρ agent maturity, T_∫(π) path integral. Source: myterms/A_privacy_is_value_equation.md.

## Edges out

- *defines* → [[V(π,t) Dragon Equation]]
- *references* → [[IEEE 7012 Integration Plan v2]]
